attributes.routing: [controller] token replaced with lowercase controller name without 'Controller' suffix

cSharpConventions.nullability: Nullable reference types enabled in .csproj, use '?' for nullable types (e.g., 'string? Summary')

typeScriptConventions.componentDecorator: standalone: true (all components are standalone, no NgModules)
typeScriptConventions.imports: Explicit per-component. CommonModule required for *ngIf, *ngFor, etc.
typeScriptConventions.observableNaming: $ suffix convention (e.g., weather$, data$) - NOT YET APPLIED in current code
examples.httpMethods: GET for retrieval (POST, PUT, DELETE not yet implemented)

routingConventions.httpMethods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE mapped to CRUD

examples.filecurrentState: Minimal structure with Controllers/ and Models/ only
examples.singleResponsibility: Controllers for HTTP only; Models for data shapes. Service & Repository layers TODO.

frontend.currentState: Minimal structure with app root component only
frontend.frontend: TypeScript interfaces matching backend JSON (currently typed as 'any[]', should be WeatherForecast[])

backendIssues: Business logic in controller (should be in Service)
Static data generation (should be from Service/Repository)
frontendIssues: Direct HttpClient in component (should be in Service)
No unsubscribe pattern (missing takeUntil or async pipe)
Loading state management is basic (should be Observable)
Hardcoded API URL (should be in environment/config)
